name: codex-rewind
description: App/CLI intercepted AppKit rewind picker and local file checkpoints for Codex sessions

interface.shortDescription: Intercept /rewind and open a native local rewind picker
interface.longDescription: Intercepts the literal /rewind prompt in Codex App before turn/start, with a CLI UserPromptSubmit hook fallback. It opens a native AppKit picker to choose a historical user turn and applies session/code rewind modes through Codex checkpoints and live thread/rollback when available. Falls back to Tk only when the AppKit helper cannot be built.
defaultPrompt: Rewind session, workspace files, or both
